entry.title: MIRO changing the vendor as it is "posted"
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I have a unique issue where the vendor of an invoice is being changed upon hitting "Post" in MIRO. I have not identified any consistency with the invoices or the vendors that are being changed, and no Partner function exists that would be causing the invoicing party to change. Our users also insist that they are not manually changing the vendor using the "Different Invoicing Party" function as well. I have reviewed SAP notes such as Note 393431 but they don't appear to explain the problem we're experiencing.

My question is, how does MIRO determine that the vendor of the invoice is the correct vendor? I have read that MM Invoice Verification matches the invoice's vendor to the PO, but in my case, it switches the vendor that is seen on the PO to a seemingly random vendor when posting the invoice. I have also been unable to replicate this issue, as when I attempt to do so in our testing environment, I consistently pull the correct vendor. It's relatively uncommon for our users as well, but a few times every week this will occur, and the incorrect vendor will get invoiced.

I would appreciate any insight on how to determine where the transaction MIRO is pulling these incorrect vendors from. 

Thank you,

MPM124

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori App F0106A SICF service missing
entry.content: go to se80, check if you have that app. if not, you have to install first

entry.title: Re: Modernization of SAP SuccessFactors EC Payroll (ECP) – Why It Matters and How It Works

entry.title: SQVI EKKO/SWWWIHEAD - How to make it work
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I am trying to create a query using T-CODE SQVI that includes the tables EKKO, SWW_WI2OBJ, and SWWWIHEAD. However, I need one or more tables that I can use to establish relationships between EKKO and SWW_WI2OBJ and SWWWIHEAD. Has anyone encountered this situation before? Could someone guide me on how to create the relationship between these, or possibly other, tables? Ultimately, I would like to query the order and receive data from the SWW_WI2OBJ and SWWWIHEAD tables. The query should include EKKO, SWW_WI2OBJ, and SWWWIHEAD.

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: SQVI EKKO/SWWWIHEAD - How to make it work
entry.content: are you working on R3 4.7? it is 2025 now....

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors New People profile - Questions
entry.content: Hello, for personal info issue, could you please check if the user has permission: Employee Central HRIS OData API (read-only). If you have this permission, then you can view all Employee Central entities on People Profile. Please refer to KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0003527163 , this KBA also includes some known issues and FQAs.

entry.title: Re: SUSG integration with ATC
entry.content: Hi Aakash, you can upload the ATC result to Readiness Check for further information. To upload, please refer to note 2913617:"To create the ZIP archive in the ABAP test cockpit for upload to SAP Readiness Check, select the context menu option Export to -> File for SAP Readiness Check in the ABAP test cockpit result browser." Regards, David

entry.title: 3F0 从SAP S/4HANA Cloud（公共版）2502版本开始支持手动结算订单和成本收集器
entry.content:
背景介绍

除了事件触发的在制品和差异结算外，还为基于事件的生产订单、流程订单和产品成本收集器引入了手动结算选项。

例如，如果要减少3F0解决方案实时基于事件而产生的大量结算凭证，订单具有较短的生命周期，因此往往不需要在制品分析，或者物流业务事件并不始终遵循正常操作顺序，则手动结算选项可以适用这些场景。

对于分配了 “已手动结算” 结算类型的订单或成本收集器，当发生业务事件（例如发货、活动确认、收货）时，不会生成任何过账。而是在期末通过APP”计划产品成本核算作业”中手动运行“手动结算：基于事件的订单和产品成本收集器” 作业（选择处理选项“过账订单”）来启动结算。冲销差异也是其中的可选项。

前提条件

在使用此新功能之前，应在 SSCUI 103940 中对基于事件的处理代码 ORDMS（制造订单手动结算）或 PCCMS（产品成本收集器手动结算）进行必要的审核或更改。

缺省情况下，提供以下预设，以红色矩形标记的部件可根据您的要求进行更改，例如：在差异计算部分中，差异拆分可以设置为否，这意味着过账期间将不考虑所有差异类别；在结算接收方部分，可将成本中心/WBS 要素/订单选择为不允许过账，并在更改后生效。

必须通过范围项目按库存生产 - 离散制造 (BJ5) 使用处理代码 ORDMS（手动结算）而不是 使用RSEBW（基于事件的缺省值）创建生产订单。您可以在生产订单创建期间将处理代码替换为 ORDMS。

或者，如果您希望某些订单类型始终使用手动结算，则可以通过 SSCUI 102431 在订单类型配置中将处理代码从 RSEBW 更新为 ORDMS。

仅当在订单类型中映射处理代码 ORDMS - 制造订单手动结算或 PCCMS - 产品成本收集器手动结算时，才需要执行此步骤。

测试场景

以订单 1000640 为例，该订单使用手动结算。应用订单成本详细信息 - 基于事件

收货、发货和活动确认后，结果如下：

另外，我们采用基于业务事件创建的订单 1000541 进行比较。

现在，我们转到计划产品成本核算作业 (F3683) 应用中的结算订单 1000640。

在 模板选择 部分中，输入以下内容：

作业模板：手动结算：基于事件的订单和产品成本收集器

作业名称：手动结算：基于事件的订单和产品成本收集器

选择步骤 2。

输入以下内容：

通过测试运行和更新运行检查后，结果如下：

进一步的，我们进入显示凭证流-生产订单

可以看到凭证流信息，只有一张结算凭证

进入日记账细节

相比较而言，基于事件的过账会在对订单进行收货，发货和确认操作时自动产生在制品的凭证。

总结

此新功能满足了减少结算凭证数量，针对简化生产及成本核算流程的特定需求，也提供了更大的灵活性。

entry.title: Forecast profiles in SOP Retail
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

In our company we would like to calculate sales forecast for our materials but we would like to use for each materials category, a different forecast profile. Is this possible ? 

We want to use Constant Planning in SOP SAP Retail

Many thanks for your help

Your thoughts please.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Tr-cd：sm_csu_installの画面で表示されるダウンロード済みのファイルについて
entry.content:
ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

Tr-cd：sm_csu_installを実行したところダウンロード済みのファイルを確認することができました。(添付画像)

以下質問させてください。

１．Tr-cd：sm_csu_installの画面では、Version61がダウンロードされている状態ですが、Version60以下はダウンロードされないのでしょうか？もしくは最新の61がダウンロードされていれば、60以下をダウンロードする必要はないのでしょうか？

２．ダウンロードされているファイルの状況はTr-cd：sm_csu_installで分かりましたが、実際に適用されているバージョンを確認する方法は何になりますでしょうか？常に最新のバージョンが適用されていることを確認できればと考えております。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Tr-cd：sm_csu_installの画面で表示されるダウンロード済みのファイルについて
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

>１．Tr-cd：sm_csu_installの画面では、Version61がダウンロードされている状態ですが、Version60以下はダウンロードされないのでしょうか？もしくは最新の61がダウンロードされていれば、60以下をダウンロードする必要はないのでしょうか？

⇒はい、ご認識の通りでございます。すべてのソフトウェアST-CONTコンテンではなく、最新のバージョンツがダウンロードすれば結構でございます。ソフトウェアST-CONTについては常に最新のバージョンを利用することが強く推奨されております。

>２．ダウンロードされているファイルの状況はTr-cd：sm_csu_installで分かりましたが、実際に適用されているバージョンを確認する方法は何になりますでしょうか？常に最新のバージョンが適用されていることを確認できればと考えております。

⇒ソフトウェアST-CONTはシステムモニタリングの必要なテンプレートが含みます。solman_setup>Application Operations>System Monitoring>step2.7 Update Contentで実際に適用されているバージョンがご確認いただけ、また最新のバージョンにアップデートがご実行いただけます。

宜しくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

entry.title: Request for CDS view to deduce the FAUF number from the PMR number
entry.content:
Due to our physical production conditions, our process provides for the implementation of an SST between SAP DM and S4H WM. This should first scan an HU, which is provided to the machine fully automatically on an order-related basis, and then read the material number and batch from SAP DM using the Get Retrieve HU API.
Furthermore, we must ensure on the process side that a provided KLT is actually consumed on the corresponding production order (FAUF), as there is no longer any manual intervention. 

SAP DM requires the FAUF so that it can post the consumption. The PMR number is obtained from the WM via the Get Physical Stock API. Our question is:

How can we deduce the FAUF number from the PMR number?
Is there a CDS view or an API that can be used for this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Keep handling unit from outbound to inbound
entry.content:
Hi @Ajit_Routray, yes we have the same system for both our plants.

Okay, just to be clear. So if I want to keep the exact same handling unit (the same number combination) when doing an inbound delivery in SAP public cloud that would not be possible?

entry.title: Re: Request for CDS view to deduce the FAUF number from t...
entry.content:
Please join CDS view I_EWM_PhysStockProd and I_EWM_WarehouseTask_2 to get the EWMStorageBin from stock view based on condition like below:

           ProductName         = <RMXXX>

and    StockView.EWMStockReferenceDocCategory  = WarehouseTaskView.EWMReferenceDocumentCategory            = PWR

and    StockView.EWMStockRefDocumentUUID         = WarehouseTaskView.EWMWarehouseRequestUUID

and    StockView.EWMStockRefDocItemUUID             = WarehouseTaskView.EWMWarehouseRequestItemUUID

and    WarehouseTaskView. ProductionOrder            = <PPO number>

entry.title: Re: Query to show "Production Order" and related "Issue f...
entry.content: Hi azacc, kinda hard to read your query. I had to paste it to chatgpt to make it readable. what happen if you take out comment on AND T12."LocCode" = T11."WhsCode"

entry.title: MM ME5A's question
entry.content:
use me5a to to query the data.When we use query condition Document type,we can't query any data.But if we don't put any condition and execute ,and we can show the data of this document type.And i have checked authority,there is no problem

For example ,put YMRO,and i can't get data.

but if i don't put anything,i can find data in next screen

entry.title: CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET creating two addition sheets by default
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm using CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET =>IF_FDT_DOC_SPREADSHEET~CREATE_DOCUMENT to create an excel. By default its creating 2 extra sheets with the name Input Help and Column Alias Mapping.

Kindly let me know how can i stop this sheets from creating.

PS. I have given all the available iv_call_type  and still its appearing

entry.title: Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 704
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE for movement type 704. I am getting 'Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 704' error. when I am doing 704 movement type in MI10 transaction is working fine.Is it the case that movement types 703 and 704 cannot use MIGO?Please help me to solve the issue.Thanks in advance.

■Error picture

GOODSMVT_CODE：05

 

■Configuration

Best regards,

Peipei

entry.title: Re: A letter to Otto – PM of the EarlyWatch Alert. I love you Otto
entry.content:
Hello @MarioDeFelipe,

I can understand your appreciation and admiration of Otto and the team's work with EWA. As a Basis consultant, I regularly reviewed and leveraged the findings presented in EWA to bring stability and performance to customer systems.

However, regarding SAP Readiness Check, I believe there is some confusion. The screenshot you posted is not actually from SAP Readiness Check. Instead, the image is of the ABAP on HANA sizing report output generated by the ABAP report /SDF/HDB_SIZING, which is delivered via SAP Note 1872170 - ABAP on HANA sizing report (S/4HANA, Suite on HANA...). SAP Readiness Check is an expansive toolset offering data collectors, data collection frameworks, and a UI5-based interactive cloud-based application on SAP for Me and on SAP Cloud ALM supporting the following eight scenarios, with more to come:

  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA -- SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA conversions
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA Upgrades -- SAP S/4HANA product version upgrades
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP BW/4HANA -- SAP BW to SAP BW/4HANA conversions
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP ERP Usage and Data Profiling -- SAP ECC data footprint analysis
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP Customer Experience Solutions -- SAP CRM to SAP CX solutions transformations
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP SuccessFactors Solutions -- SAP ERP HCM to SAP SuccessFactors solutions transformations
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP Cloud ALM -- SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM transformations
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge -- SAP BW or SAP BW/4HANA to SAP Datasphere, SAP BW bridge transformations

While sizing is one aspect to consider when evaluating an SAP ECC system in preparation for the conversion to SAP S/4HANA, it is far from the only one. In fact, sizing is only one of fifteen tiles presented in SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA. Below is a screenshot of the dashboard view from the SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA demo analysis.

Although SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA calls the ABAP on HANA sizing report, the SAP S/4HANA sizing detail view in SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA looks completely different from the ABAP on HANA sizing report output you posted. Within SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA, we enable users to simulate growth and reduction, evaluate top tables, and explore data volume reduction possibilities. Below is a screenshot of the SAP S/4HANA Sizing detail view from the SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA demo analysis.

In addition to the interactive UI5 dashboard, customers can generate a point-in-time download document from within their results dashboard, which will produce an offline version of the findings similar to an EWA report. Customers using SAP Readiness Check on SAP Cloud ALM can also forward their SAP Readiness Check findings to the project and task management capabilities within SAP Cloud ALM to embed the findings within their transformation project.

For more information on SAP Readiness Check please visit the following:

  • SAP Readiness Check landing page on SAP for Me: https://me.sap.com/readinesscheck
  • SAP Readiness Check on SAP Help Portal: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_READINESS_CHECK
  • SAP Readiness Check on SAP Community: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/readiness-check
  • SAP Readiness Check for SAP S/4HANA Overview Video: https://video.sap.com/media/t/1_iiijux10/191066233 (3 min and 36 sec)

Greg Clavier
Solution Owner of SAP Readiness Check

entry.title: Re: URL OF QM
entry.content:
你好， 看起来您所示的字段是在增强页面的自定义字段，并非SAP标准功能。

不过针对需要上传文档作为附件，SAP公有云ERP里面仍然有Linked Documents的部分，如下截图：

entry.title: Re: Group Preparation Ledger - Currency Mapping
entry.content:
Hello Mike,
Seems in S/4 HANA 2022( GRPL is activated), in the app "Define consolidation unit", it is not able to choose LOCAL_CURR_SOURCE in app "Define consolidation unit", neither in CXB1.  
Does this mean only the company currency can be used as consolidation unit local currency?

entry.title: DAAが行う通信のTLSバージョンを1.1以下を拒否する方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様


お世話になっております。


 


現在、暗号化設定の調査を行っておりまして、DAAについて以下の2つのライブラリを使用してSSL通信することが分かりました。


IAIK ライブラリ
JVM のデフォルト SSL エンジン (JSSE) 


 


上記の2つのライブラリで発生する通信（クライアントとサーバ）で、TLS1.1以下を拒否する設定をしたいのですが、設定方法とパラメータ値が分からず教えてください。


smdagent.propertiesに設定が必要かと考えていますが、設定できるパラメータ値の記載されているドキュメントがほとんど見つからず、


設定可能なパラメータと設定値（設定値の説明も含む）をご提供お願いいたします。


 


以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: DAAが行う通信のTLSバージョンを1.1以下を拒否する方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

お問い合わせ頂いたTLS1.1以下を拒否する設定については、お手数をおかけいたしますが、下記のノートをご参考お願い致します。

SAPノート3346659のセクション3.5をご参照お願い致します。

3346659 - TLS Ciphersuite String Configuration for ABAP and SAP Kernel-Based Systems

3318423 - Is TLS 1.3 Supported by SAP Kernel for ABAP and SAP S/4HANA?

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝SAPノートから抜粋＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

TLSバージョン1.2と1.3のみを有効にする場合は、次のプロファイルパラメータ設定で有効にできます：

ssl/ciphersuites = 1569:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH
ssl/client_ciphersuites = 1584:PFS:HIGH::EC_X25519:EC_P256:EC_HIGH

＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝SAPノートから抜粋＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝＝

以上、宜しくお願い致します。

SAPサポート

entry.title: Re: Looking for SAP MM Trainee/Entry-Level Opportunities

entry.title: Re: Looking for SAP MM Trainee/Entry-Level Opportunities
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: How to set filter when consuming the Custom CDS view based API in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
After publishing custom APIs through custom CDS views and using external tools to obtain information, the query criteria do not work and cannot be filtered by individual fields like standard APIs; 
 
Do you have any solutions?

通过自定义CDS视图发布的自定义API后，利用外部工具获取信息，查询条件不起作用，不能像标准API那样按照个别字段筛选；

请问有什么解决方案吗？


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to set filter when consuming the Custom CDS view...
entry.content:
Please kindly try to find the solution below:

  1. Get the metadata first, <URL>/YY1_<ODATA-SERVICE>/$metadata
  2. In the metadata locate the EntitySets and check its Entity type, it will be something like this: 
     <EntitySet Name="YY1_<NAME>" EntityType="YY1_<ODATASERVICE>.YY1_<NAME>Parameters" sap:creatable="false" sap:updatable="false" sap:deletable="false" sap:pageable="false" sap:content-version="1"/>
  3. Then locate the the <EntityType Name="YY1_<NAME>Parameters" as shown below
    <EntityType Name="YY1_<NAME>Parameters" sap:semantics="parameters" sap:content-version="1">
                    <Key>
                        <PropertyRef Name="P_1"/>
                        <PropertyRef Name="P_2"/>
                    </Key>
  4. Under the Parameters EntityType find the following:
                <NavigationProperty Name="<RESULTSNAME>" .../>
    </EntityType>
  5. Run the URL as follow https://<URL>/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_<ODATA-SERVICE>/EntitySet(P_1='<WHATEVER-VALUE>',P_2='<WHATEVER-VALUE>')/<RESULTSNAME>
  6. Note: If the result is very large, it's possilbe to add $top=<n> (i.e. $top=1) for testing purposes like that:

    https://<URL>/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_<ODATA-SERVICE>/YY1_<NAME>(P_1='<WHATEVER-VALUE>',P_2='<WHATEVER-VALUE>')/<RESULTSNAME>?$top=<n>
  7. It's possible to use the other property instead of key to filter, the format is:https://<URL>/sap/opu/odata/sap/YY1_<ODATA-SERVICE>/EntitySet?$filter=PropertyRefName eq 'Value'

Thanks and Best Regards,

Bell

entry.title: Re: Enhancement Requirement for Custom Reports – Like MB52 Report
entry.content: remove the tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement and add tag Supplier Chain

entry.title: Re: Edit Relational Connections in CMC for SAP BO BI 4.3

entry.title: Re: Configuration: SAP Ariba SSO with SAP Cloud Identity Services - Identity Authentication
entry.content:
Thank you very much, @ondrej_pandoscak .

I'm still in the process of setting up the integration here, but just to share my experience—for anyone trying to connect to the "Test Site"—I ran into an issue with the SAML name while configuring https://<tenant_id>.sourcing3.ariba.com in the IAS Application Bundle after uploading the metadata.

For some weird reason, IAS was throwing an error during the logon test (spotted it in the troubleshooting logs on IAS):

"No trusted Service Provider configuration with name [http://<tenant_id>.sourcing3.ariba.com]"

After taking a closer look, I realized that the SAML 2.0 Configuration name in IAS must start with http (not https).

Not sure if the metadata from "Ariba Test" is outdated or different, but that was the issue in my case. Changing the SAML 2.0 Configuration name to use http worked for me.

Cheers,
Rafael Yegros.

entry.title: Re: URL OF QM
entry.content: 你好，我希望类似于收货过账时，我可以上传关联URL-link，不需要上传文件。（你知道的，上传文件会占用内存，所以我不希望上传文件，希望直接关联网址。）

entry.title: MRP run creates schedule line quantity more than the SA target quantity.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am having an issue during MRP Run. The run creates schedule line quantity more than the target quantity in scheduling agreement.

I understand that to restrict the MRP run to stop creating schedule line if the Maximum quantity in MEQ1 quota arrangement is fulfilled.

The issue here is that this solution is not applied to my client since they create scheduling agreement (same material and vendor) more than once in a week or in a month and target quantity varies.

I also understand that changing W to E to the 06 067 "schedule qty greater than target qty" will only works during manually created schedule line and doesn't work during MRP Run.

Hope there is a way. Is there anybody can give a solution on this?

Regards,

Soledad

entry.title: Pre-Carriage and On-Carriage on Freight Booking
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to create a FB before the creation of the sales order with FU to prebook capacity with the carrier. The issue I have is that I do not get the ability to maintain the location for pre-carriage and on-carriage. I was only given the option to enter the location for the main carriage. If I have a FU and create the FB from the FU, I can get the pre-carriage and on-carriage stage. This is almost like a multimodal function that I am looking for. Does anyone know whether there is a way to have the pre-carriage and on-carriage available if I am creating a FB without FU for a start? Thanks a lot for any pointers.

I am using S/4HANA embedded TM BTW.

What I get today:

What I am hoping to get:

Regards

SFC

entry.title: Re: Undefined new sap.ui.layout.form.SimpleForm
entry.content: Use recommendation for "Don't use references to global names" in  JavaScript Code Issues - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

entry.title: The backbone of your HR success with Cloud Applications: Why Org Structure Design Matters
entry.content:
At SAP SuccessFactors, we’ve seen time and time again that a well-designed org structure in Employee Central can unlock significant business value, ensure consistent data, and support seamless integration across your entire HCM suite. Here’s a comprehensive overview of why org structure design is crucial and how to approach it effectively.

Organizational Structure Overview

At its core, an organizational structure defines the hierarchy and reporting relationships within a company. In the context of cloud foundations, this structure includes various levels such as business units, divisions, and departments.

These standard objects form the hierarchy through which people, processes, and systems interact. While seemingly straightforward, these elements are foundational for reporting, permissions, workflows, talent processes, and more.

Importantly, organizations also manage position structures—the "seats" within the org chart that employees move in and out of. These form the backbone of the position-to-position hierarchy, which many organizations are adopting as the leading model over traditional employee-to-employee hierarchies.

Key Factors Influencing Your Org Structure Design

Several factors influence the design of your organizational structure for cloud foundations:

  1. Business Strategy and Goals: Your structure should reflect how the organization plans to grow, restructure, or evolve.
  2. System of record: Whether you operate in a hybrid landscape or are fully cloud-based, Employee Central often becomes the authoritative source of truth for all downstream systems.
  3. Integration requirements: How your data flows to SAP S/4HANA, third-party systems, or talent modules matters greatly
  4. Regulatory and reporting needs: Local compliance, security access, and headcount visibility must be considered.

Org Structure Design Considerations

There are two primary approaches to designing your org structure in Employee Central:

  1. Standard 3-Level Hierarchy
    Use Business Unit > Division > Department—this is the most widely used approach (90–95% of customers). It's simple, supported by all standard reports and integrations, and ensures compatibility with the broader SuccessFactors suite.
  2. Extended Hierarchy with Customization
    If your organization requires more than three levels, consider reusing standard objects like Department in a nested structure or creating custom MDF objects. This approach allows for flexibility without sacrificing downstream compatibility—just be cautious of added complexity in reporting and user navigation.

Positions as Leading Hierarchy

In modern org design, positions are king. Moving away from traditional “chief” roles toward a position-to-position hierarchy offers:

  • Greater stability (less disruption from people changes)
  • Improved workflow flexibility (approval chains based on position IDs)
  • Future-proofing for innovations and enhancements
  • More robust succession, career, and talent planning

Whether or not you're using shared/mass positions, aiming for a 1:1 employee-to-position relationship is a best practice for reporting accuracy and streamlined administration.

Best Practices and Configuration Settings

To optimize your organizational structure for cloud foundations, consider these best practices:

  • Use standard foundation objects whenever possible
    This ensures better integration, maintenance, and support from SAP.
  • Design for scalability, not just today’s structure
    Consider future changes, potential reorganizations, and growth
  • Align permissions and workflows to your org hierarchy
    Dynamic roles and role-based permissions (RBP) should be structured around business units, divisions, or departments.
  • Establish position as your single point of job data
    Maintain job fields on the position object, sync one-way to job info.
  • Plan for change
    Communicate with stakeholders, plan your transitions, and test thoroughly—org structure changes are highly visible and impactful.

A strong org structure isn’t just about clean data—it’s about enabling agility, scalability, and trust across your business. Whether you are cloud-first or hybrid, designing your structure thoughtfully in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central ensures you are ready for whatever comes next.

Need support with your org design journey? Reach out to your Customer Success Manager or Account Executive to explore resources, planning tools, and upcoming webinars.

The original webinar & slides are available on-demand here:

Org Structure Design Principles & Best Practices - Apr 8

entry.title: Re: ADS: com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.Processin(200101)
entry.content: Hello Sir, I am facing this issues in Particular PO only, not all the PO.

entry.title: Re: CAP Fiori Elements Invoking Custom Action (err: Unkno...
entry.content:
In CustomActions.js#8, the action is named incorrectly. You can see the correct way to name these in the sample in Flexible Programming Model Explorer

examples:

.invokeAction("Service.boundAction"

.invokeAction("Service.EntityContainer/unboundAction"

entry.title: Re: How we can Generate / Trigger XML when Saving Freight Order from SAP TM to Third Party system
entry.content: Hi Sarah, thanks for your quick answer - really appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP ABAP Environment and ADT Troubleshooting Guide
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

BTP CF environment sometimes occurs evacuation while building batch functions for SAP BTP, could you please assist how this can be trouble shoted. 

 

Regards,

Raksha

entry.title: Re: Status of equipment after GR
entry.content:
Hi Priti,

I believe, you are referring to the goods receipt for a serialized material. If that is the case, then you can set the equipment required indicator in the corresponding serial profile procedure MMSL along with equipment category. The status AVLB will appear only if the equipment is activated along with serial number generation. Alternatively if the serial numbers are already generated then you can simply activate the equipment with the edit mode of serial number/s in question.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: A letter to Otto – PM of the EarlyWatch Alert. I love you Otto
entry.content:
Hi @greg_clavier 

You got it, this post is an appreciation of EWA for the entire team, at the same time, the Readiness Check is also an important report that helps a lot and gives also incredible value! I will modify that piece of the blog, thanks for centralizing the Readiness Check content, and the entire appreciation for the team as well

entry.title: Cannot find required duplicate file for exercise - Subscribed Learning Hub
entry.content:
Hi. 

I recently started the course 'Acquiring Core ABAP Skills' and subscribed learning hub to use the hands-on experience. 

I'm currently facing 2 obstacles at the moment. One is that I am unable to find the required template from Eclipse IDE. There were other exercises that required templates, and I was able to retrieve those but for this template /LRN/CL_S4D401_ATS_SQL_TRACE, I was unable to do that. I launched new abap cloud project and added the necessary config file for the course, but it still did not show what I needed. 

Second is that whenever I try to write a new script from new abap cloud project, i cannot add if_oo_adt_classrun interface when I create a new class. This interface only appears when I create new class from the first abap cloud project I created. 

Would appreciate any advice.

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding enhancement to the Internal Hire process.
entry.content:
Hi @Padmaja_16.

This is being addressed in 1H 2025 release. As a workaround please map and send value for "Employment Info.start date" in Recruit to hire mapping tool.

Thanks,

Smita

entry.title: Re: Fiori-Style Analytics Dashboard: 'Invalid Username/Pa...
entry.content:
Hi Boris,

B1_4d4c535F502443230323341_RO and other B1_* users are shared technical users (runtime generated, hence less in number also). Basically, internal SB1 users are not directly mapped. 

Please see 'PAL_USER_MAPPING' 

SELECT * FROM "PAL_USER_MAPPING";

to see technical users to role

Thanks,

Arun

entry.title: Re: User Defined Field for OSRN table
entry.content:
Hi Robert_Msng ,

UDF can be created using SAP Business One client.

Go to Tools → Customization Tools → User Defined Fields - Management → Inventory → Serial/Batch Number object and create the UDF.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: CORS and Access-Control-Allow-Origin in SAP Build APP...
entry.content: In the metadata of the service, function import already implemented? Like '<FunctionImport Name="MyFunction" EntitySet="..." ReturnType="..." m:HttpMethod="POST" />'?

entry.title: Re: No Stock Deficit Error for Backflush Components While Production Order Confirmation CO15
entry.content: Hi Sunny, Did you get any solution to this? I am also stuck in this after our system upgrade. Please revert with answer if you have fixed this.

entry.title: Re: Personalized Recommendations in the SAP SuccessFactor...
entry.content:
Hello @ArvinMab ,

You can check under VLS configuration if the VLS configuration for MS Teams is present in your instance or not.

And to enable to personalized recommendations, kindly check in the below KBA if this feature  has been enabled already for your Data Center. 3382799 - Rollout Schedule for Personalized Recommendations

If it is enabled for your DC and you would like to enable personalized recommendations, please reach out to your CSP to assist in contacting the responsible team via the email: sapsf_lrn_recommendations@sap.com.  

 If this information helped you then please consider giving Kudos or accepting this post as solution.

Swapnil

entry.title: Re: Bidirectional integration between SAP SuccessFactors & Azure Active Directory in Microsoft Azure
entry.content:
Hi @former_member711310

For step "7.2 set the Provisioning Status to On and Click Save." Is this a one time enablement? How to schedule this Provisioning job with a prefer frequency? Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Sap Enable Now Launch Error - ZIP Error & FDIError
entry.content:
Delete the Cache folder here: C:\Users\anste\AppData\Local\Temp\wpb_cloud

And make sure your network connection is not impacted by the strict firewall rules or SSL traffic inspection tools like ZScaler etc.

P.S. If you try to download the SEN Producer using your private workstation/laptop, everything works fine, right? 😉

entry.title: Re: MD04 Available qty not correct as per scope of check
entry.content:
You need to use transaction CO09 to view ATP quantities.

MD04 gives an overview of the stock level and the requirements - but that not necessarily equals ATP.

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Manager - Error message when deleting an O...
entry.content:
Enable Now visible error messages like this provide no context (useless, in other words). Do the same with the browser debugging tools active (Ctrl+Shift+I or F12) and check the details of the erroneous operation in the Network or Console tabs.

P.S. Debugging tools must be opened before you try to delete the Ord.Unit, not after. 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Re: Complying to EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive Scope 3 Reporting with SAP Ariba
entry.content: Alright some parts of this blog are missing paragraphs and sentences as it did not copy over highlighted words with reviewer comments. I have submitted the correct version for review and publication.

entry.title: IP10 Maintenance schedule plan process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently facing issue in IP10 transaction while scheduling maintenance plans. 
When the start date of call is in previous year, we could see system is creating calls from previous year. But the calls are getting creted based on scheduling period and it is taking current year as basis and scheduling calls.
This is causing calls scheduled even after End date of scheduling as calls are getting started from current year.

For example, 

For below we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2028. But as scheduling period is 3YR, system is considering current year 2025 3 which is till 2028 to schedule calls.

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 3 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

In the below case, we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2031. But as scheduling period is 6YR, system is considering current year 2025 6 which is till 2031 to schedule calls. But as end date of scheduling is 2031, business are expecting no calls after 2030 (end date of scheduling). 

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 6 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

Please let us know if the above is standard behavior. If yes, We need your inputs on how to setup the calls to consider the start of cycle date (not the current date) and  to stop the calls at the end date of scheduling.

entry.title: Re: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple...
entry.content: Hi Victor, Thanks for the response. We have done the configuration in the Transfer manager in 71 event Passing KUNRE of header to CUSTOMER field at item level. It is working fine.

entry.title: Re: Replacement of Core Tool functionalities by functionalities in Cockpit Fiori apps as of SAP CC 2
entry.content:
Hi Abhijeet,

One of our customer is upgrading from CC5.0 to CC2023 and they only use CC Coretool before.

One issue I observed during testing CC2023 cockpit is the existing Charge plan is not editable and not visible in Cockpit. They can only be edited in core tool as they are created initially there.

Will this issue be resolved in CC2025 cockpit?

Thank you very much.

Regards

Grace

entry.title: Issue with Automatic Theme Detection for Custom Themes in Build Workzone
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have two custom themes (light and dark) in the UI Theme Designer. I created a custom set so that the themes would automatically adjust based on the local system, similar to SAP Quartz (Set). However, the custom set is not appearing in the Build Workzone standard edition launchpad under User Menu > Settings > Appearance.

I have found that automatic theme detection is not supported for custom theme sets. If this is the case, what is the alternative way to achieve this feature?

Findings: 

What's New for SAP Business Technology Platform | SAP Help Portal

Regards,
Vishal Lekharajani

entry.title: Re: Pre-Carriage and On-Carriage on Freight Booking
entry.content:
Hi @SFC ,

I would suggest to use Master Data called Schedule (Assume Air Flight or Voyage) , Allocation  (Prebook), Default Route in combination if possible ...Please read for details

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/cdfefb406e504a3588b0ee9603544363.html

Precarrige: either you can use default route ( I suggest to use if it is fixed - Maintain check box while creating FU ) or lane also option

multimodal Scenario: We can do various way , but we need to execute the things efficiently.

Example:

Delivery/the pre-carriage/on-carriage stage.- Freight Order (Road)

Main : FB (Air/Sea)

Default Routes:

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/using-default-route-transit-time-in-the-freight-unit-scheduling/ba-p/13853460

"Does anyone know whether there is a way to have the pre-carriage and on-carriage available if I am creating a FB without FU for a start? " -> As per my knowledge, FB is execution document once you have Sales in hand and ready to ship. Booking means its booked and ready to go...I think you can schedule and convert to FB and Use default route if route is fixed. 

Schedule Mater Creation: Either Manually or upload if you have carrier's schedule so you can transportation before.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/00b07051d6022066e10000000a441470.html

Please let me know if you have further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Keep handling unit from outbound to inbound
entry.content:
Hi @ johannahansson - "Okay, just to be clear. So if I want to keep the exact same handling unit (the same number combination) when doing an inbound delivery in SAP public cloud that would not be possible?" - Honestly I do not know much about public cloud, because I never worked on Public cloud , just shared document of public cloud for your info However this scenario would work in Decentral or Embedded or Private cloud, already done for projects. Could you please check with SAP.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Modernizing SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll
entry.content:
If a customer is already on EC, S4HANA 2023 FPS01 with H4S4 activated(utilising full Time & Attendance module inc RPTIME00) but running payroll on ECP (Current Technology version), would it make sense to  put the payroll processing back into the existing S4HANA system rather than keeping a separate ECP system running on exactly the same platform? It seems like a unnecessary double up to have a separate ECP system just for running payroll?

Also is PTP compatible with S4HANA and do we have an option of using either BIB or PTP for EC to S4HANA integration?

entry.title: SAP CALM Event Notification Recipients templates for systems
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to to define a template for event mail recipients for health monitoring and just add this to a system? Or do we have to set the mail recipients it for every event for every system by hand?

regards

Bastian

entry.title: hi All i want more selection screen option in cm53 tcode how I do that
entry.content:
hello Everyone ,

I have one urgent requirement where I  copied the cm53 t code report(RCCRY000) to custom report in that RCCRT000 Report I see only WBS element selection option i want to add more selection option  so please tell me where other option are hide or how i add it in selection screen ..

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Casting issue after project...
entry.content:
As @RobertWaywell mentioned is was the difference in datatypes specifically for our sales time object that got cast to a Time. 

It never caused any issues, except for in one specific case, so I never considered it.
Thank you for the help, I had been looking for the problem for an embarrassingly long time.

entry.title: Re: Inspection Lot cancellation after Goods receipt and p...
entry.content:
Hi @Atul_Joshi ,

As per my understanding, inspection lot usage decision rejected then only you are returning to supplier. Is this inspection lot generated while goods recipt ?

Are you moving the stock to Return area/location before creating return delivery? If yes, you can do enhancement during WT confirmation. 

Could you please help to answer so someone could provide solution.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: SAP API for retrieving materials
entry.content:
Hi,

We are developing a custom Fiori solution for physical inventory process where in we need to have all materials fetched upon entering plant and storage location are selected as selection parameters.

We have checked API API_MATERIAL_STOCK_SRV, but it is only fetching stock materials. Our requirement is to fetch all materials irrespective of stock levels.

Please suggest suitable API for the above requirement.

entry.title: How to Map Parent-Child Relationship for Both Customers & Vendors in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

We are looking for best practices & standard approach in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to handle a real-time business scenario involving Parent-Child mapping for both Customers and Vendors, where centralized payment receipt & liability management is required.

 

Business Requirement:

Customers:

Parent BP: 1234

 

Child BPs: 4567, 7890, 2345

 

Invoices are raised from Child BPs based on POs received from the customer (GST-wise creation done for each location).

 

Requirement:

→ Payments are collected centrally in Parent BP (1234) via Bank API e-Collection.

→ Payment received in Parent BP should get reconciled & cleared against invoices lying in Child BPs.

→ Credit Management is to be maintained at Parent BP level.

 

Vendors:

Parent BP: 9876

 

Child BPs: 6543, 3210, 5678

 

Procurements & invoices are processed at the Child BP level.

 

Requirement:

→ Payments to vendors are processed centrally from Parent BP (9876).

→ Liability for all Child BP invoices should be paid from Parent BP account.

→ Vendor evaluation & liability monitoring at Parent BP level.

 

Clarifications Required:

  1. Relationship Mapping:

What is the recommended Relationship Category to be used in BP Master Data for both Customers & Vendors in Public Cloud?

(e.g., BUR001 - Has Subsidiary, BUR017 - Is Invoiced By, BUR018 - Is Paid By, or any other specific for Vendor?)

 

  1. Centralized Payment Processing:

For Customer Receipts via Bank API e-Collection — how to configure payments received in Parent BP to automatically clear Child BP invoices?

 

For Vendor Payments — how to process payment from Parent BP and clear Child BP liabilities?

 

  1. Credit & Liability Management:

For Customer Credit Management, is assigning Credit Segment only at Parent BP sufficient for controlling exposure of all Child BPs?

 

For Vendor Liability Monitoring, is there any standard feature to track consolidated liability at Parent BP level?

 

  1. Master Data Setup:

Is Alternative Payee or Alternative Payer mapping applicable and supported in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for these scenarios?

(For both Customer Receipts and Vendor Payments)

 

  1. Standard Apps / Best Practices:

Are there any standard apps or best practice guides available for managing this Parent-Child BP structure for centralized payment and reconciliation?

 

Would appreciate your guidance, configuration steps, or SAP Help documentation references for handling this scenario in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Custom webservice call from SAP CC
entry.content:
Hi Anil,
Did you achieve this functionality? If yes, please share how to achieve it.

entry.title: Re: CL_FDT_XL_SPREADSHEET creating two addition sheets by...
entry.content:
Hi  Keerthanakg ,

actually, you can't stop the creating of the two extra sheets, because that is the scope of the method and actually, according to the package concept, you are not allowed to simply use this class.

This class is part of the BRFplus Framework and it serves a clearly purpose.

For your task I would be suggest taking a look at abap2xlsx · GitHub.

Best Regards

Attila

entry.title: Re: master data cleanup wizard - item not listed
entry.content:
Hi,

Those connected "workstations" are processes or applications, running on your server, that are connected to B1. Please just click 'Ignore'.

On the next screen, it should show items that can be deleted. Items with transactions cannot be deleted. From the screenshot it looks like you entered a range of item codes, and it is possible that no items within that range happen to be eligible. Please empty the item code range fields and click 'Search', just to see if you get any results at all.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Functionality for PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Thanks @swadhinata 

Actually the mail should get triggered to the suppliers maintained in business partner level along with PO attachment.

And also we have maintained three internal users in workflow and assigned email template.

Now internal users also receiving mail but there is no attachment.

Suppliers and internal users should receive mails individually along with PO attachment . We don't want to add internal users in CC. Is it possible, please guide.

Thanks

Veera Vani

entry.title: SF LMS Reporting Item Workflow attributes - Approval/Received Dates
entry.content:
Hi Experts , How to fetch SF LMS workflow approval/received  dates for an Course or Item .Which object or data element to be used.

Thanks,

Ravi

entry.title: Re: What is the file size limit when using the FTP adapter in SAP Integration Suite ?
entry.content: Hey Alex, is SAP planning to increase the Payload in Integration Suite? We are facing more then one iFlows with huge Data Files with more than 1 GB per file. This is erveytime more than a challage to handle these files. Also we have the same Problem with our JDBC Adapter and SQL Responses over 1.5 Million records. In 2025 we should be able to handle these amounts of data. Best Regards, Alex

entry.title: On-premise SNC SAPCryptolib with publicly trusted CA - for use with SAP Secure Login for SAP GUI
entry.content:
Good day,

Since SAP provides out-of-box trusted SAP Cloud CA signed user certificates for SAP Secure Login Service for SAP GUI, does anyone know if SAP can provide a trusted certificate to be used in on-premise SNC communications? We would like to avoid creating a private CA and distributing certificates to thousands of users. The SAP CA signed certificate would be used in place for the SNC SAPCryptolib PSE with the user pattern as used in this solution e.g. CN=, L=xxx.accounts.ondemand.com, OU=xxx-secure-login-service, OU=SAP BTP Clients, O=SAP SE, C=DE ...and also signed by SAP Cloud CA. Essentially, I would create the SNC PSE with the solution user pattern and CN of our choice, create a CSR and send it to SAP SE Cloud CA to be signed.

Does SAP offer this as an option? ....or is everyone just using a private PKI ? If your organisation is using a private PKI how do you distribute the Root and Intermediate certificates if you are not using a Windows or Azure domain? If you are using a publicly trusted CA with this solution please provide details.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Functionality for PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
@veeravani  :    Just check below link. specifically, step-2  

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/59509cd182294ca7aa886bb5293f2a56.html?state=DRAFT&version=2508.500&q=email+PO+output+to+users+

If you have not implemented BADI to derive additional users dynamically then select suitable option under " Email Address".

Markus

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Functionality for PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
sorry i am not able to access the link.

Thanks 

Veera Vani

entry.title: Re: Email Notification Functionality for PO in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content: @veeravani

entry.title: Re: Can the Requested Quantity key figure only shows number?
entry.content: Dear, my understanding of a support community is teaching people and helping them out by showing how. The question is good, but your answer cannot be an accepted solution.

entry.title: Re: Business rule for Location as Accrual Recalculation field
entry.content:
Hi Clumbert,

For accrual recalculation, we have added "Location" as recalculation field in Time account type.

All accruals will be generated at the beginning of the year i.e., 01/01/2025. If the employee changing Location in the middle of the year, for example, from 01st of April 2025 to some other Location, then to recalculate accruals, I am trying to build a logic using "Get job info string field value on key date (). 

Thank you.

 

Regards,

Pavani

entry.title: Looking for SAP Table Related to Transport Management with Freight Amount Field
entry.content:
Hello Experts

Hope you are doing well.

I am currently working on a requirement related to Transport Management, and I’m looking for a standard SAP table that stores freight amount details. Could you please help me identify if such a table exists, and if so, which field contains the freight amount?

I have checked using standard table:/SCMTMS/_TCHARGE 

field name: total_inv_amt.

Not get any output by using this field, field itself empty entire table.

Any suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your support!

Best Regards 

Bharath
